hero.subtitle: India's trusted online marketplace — discover services, list what you offer, buy, sell & rent

categories.subtitle: Explore our consulting services across multiple categories.
categories.house_desc: Browse apartments, villas, and independent houses for buy, sell, or rent.
categories.land_desc: Explore residential, commercial, and agricultural land plots.
categories.pg_desc: Discover affordable paying guest accommodations near you.
categories.commercial_desc: Office spaces, shops, warehouses, and co-working spaces.
categories.vehicle_desc: Buy and sell cars, bikes, scooters, trucks, and more.
categories.commodity_desc: Electronics, furniture, appliances, and miscellaneous items.

how_it_works.subtitle: Getting started with our consulting services is easy.
how_it_works.search_desc: Browse verified listings across India. Filter by city, category, and budget to find exactly what you need.
how_it_works.connect_desc: Connect directly with verified sellers and service providers. Get details, schedule visits, and negotiate transparent pricing.
how_it_works.get_started_desc: Finalize your deal with confidence. We ensure a smooth, secure, and hassle-free experience from start to finish.

cta.subtitle: Join thousands of sellers who trust BhoomiTayi. List your service in minutes and reach millions of potential buyers across India.

footer.description: BhoomiTayi is an online marketplace connecting buyers, sellers, and service providers across India.

listing.no_listings_desc: Your listings will appear here once you create one.
listing.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this listing? This action cannot be undone.

bella.name: Bella
bella.subtitle: AI Assistant - Controls Everything
bella.welcome:
Hi! I'm Bella, your smart assistant! I can help you find properties AND control the entire website.

Try saying:
- 'dark mode' or 'light mode'
- 'reading mode' for cozy reading
- 'font large' for bigger text
- 'help' to see everything I can do!
bella.greeting: Hello! I'm Bella, your friendly real estate assistant!
bella.fallback:
I'm not sure about that, but I'm here to help! Try:
- Ask about properties: 'houses', 'land', 'PG'
- Control settings: 'dark mode', 'reading mode', 'font large'
- Say 'help' to see everything I can do
bella.system_mode_done: Done! Theme follows your system preference now.
bella.reading_on: Reading mode activated! Warm sepia tones for comfortable reading.
bella.reading_off: Reading mode disabled! Back to normal view.
bella.contrast_on: High contrast mode enabled! Better visibility.
bella.contrast_off: High contrast disabled. Normal colors restored.
bella.font_xlarge: Font size set to extra large!
bella.animations_on: Animations restored! Smooth transitions are back.
bella.compact_off: Compact mode disabled. Comfortable spacing restored.

tommy.name: Tommy's Guide
tommy.home_greeting: Welcome to BhoomiTayi! I'm Tommy, your guide. Let me show you around!
tommy.home_step1: Use the search bar at the top to find properties by location, type, or keyword.
tommy.home_step2: Scroll down to see all categories - Houses, Land, PG, Commercial, Vehicles & Commodities.
tommy.home_step3: Want to sell? Click 'Register Service' in the navbar to list your property for free!
tommy.home_step4: Sign up to save favorites, post listings, and get inquiry alerts.
tommy.houses_greeting: You're browsing Houses! Let me help you find the perfect home.
tommy.land_greeting: Looking for land? Great investment choice! Here's how to navigate.
tommy.pg_greeting: Searching for PG accommodation? Let me guide you!
tommy.commercial_greeting: Looking for commercial space? Smart business move!
tommy.vehicles_greeting: Browsing vehicles? Let me help you find a great deal!
tommy.sell_greeting: Ready to sell? I'll walk you through every step.
tommy.login_greeting: Welcome back! Let me help you sign in.
tommy.signup_field_name: Enter your full name - this will be shown on your profile.
tommy.signup_field_phone: Enter your 10-digit Indian mobile number for verification.
tommy.signup_field_email: Enter your email address - we'll use this for login and notifications.
tommy.signup_field_password: Create a strong password with at least 6 characters.
tommy.signup_field_confirm: Re-enter your password to confirm it matches.
tommy.dashboard_greeting: Welcome to your Dashboard! Here's your control center.
tommy.default_greeting: I'm Tommy, your guide! I can help you navigate this page.

email.approval_body: Congratulations! Your listing '{{title}}' has been approved and is now live on our portal.
email.rejection_body: We regret to inform you that your listing '{{title}}' has been rejected by our admin team.
email.support_text: If you have any questions, contact support@bhoomitayi.com
